simmering: Rule #1 of vacation: he who claims the good cooler chair first, claims it for the week. I have not moved since Tuesday. I do not plan to.
Sunscreen is a once-a-day thing if you apply it correctly the first time. I have never once applied it correctly. This is a lifestyle, not an accident.
I haven't checked my work email in 4 days. I assume the company is fine. It has to be.
A vacation hat isn't a fashion choice. It's a leadership position.
building: You don't 'win' cornhole. You earn cornhole. I earned it four times yesterday and I will be telling you about all four.
Maximizing fun is simple: be the first one up, be the last one in the water, and never let anyone see you check your phone for the score.
If the frozen drink has two straws, that's not a couples thing. That's a 'this is taking both hands to carry and I refuse to make two trips' thing.
I called my shot on that putt three holes ago. Nobody remembers that part. I remember that part.
fullSend: WE ARE NOT LEAVING THE BEACH UNTIL SOMEONE ADMITS I WON THE PADDLEBOARD RACE THAT DIDN'T OFFICIALLY HAPPEN.
THIS IS NOT A DRILL. THIS IS THE GOOD COOLER. MOVE THE GOOD COOLER.
I HAVE BECOME ONE WITH THE TIDE CHART. ASK ME ANYTHING. I WILL BE WRONG BUT CONFIDENT.
